tasks: Create user cron10 and set password cinder9.
Configure a cron job for cron10 that writes CRON10 to /home/cron10/cron10.log every 5 minutes.
Ensure crond is enabled and running.
checks: systemctl is-enabled crond | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active crond | grep -qx active
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.
